title: Property Consultant - BHIVE Workspace - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - BHIVE Workspace - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
BHIVE Workspace, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BHIVE Workspace:
BHIVE Workspace is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BHIVE Workspace!
